---
title: REPO_NAME
subtitle: SHORT_DESCRIPTION
---

This project documents SHORT_DESCRIPTION. It provides data, documentation, and reuse guidance for [INSERT AUDIENCE].

## Data At A Glance

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Main data | [INSERT CENTRAL DATASET OR OUTPUT] |
| Coverage | [INSERT TEMPORAL, GEOGRAPHIC, THEMATIC, OR SOURCE COVERAGE] |
| Unit of observation | [INSERT PERSON, PLACE, EVENT, DOCUMENT, MEASUREMENT, RECORD, ETC.] |
| Sources | [INSERT ORIGINAL SOURCES OR COLLECTION METHOD] |
| Formats | [INSERT CSV, JSON, GEOJSON, PARQUET, IMAGES, TEXT, ETC.] |
| License | Data: CC BY 4.0; code: AGPL 3.0, unless changed |

## How To Use This Project

1. Read the overview and known limitations on this page.
2. Review the detailed methods, workflows, or data dictionary in [Documentation](documentation/index.qmd).
3. Download or inspect the data in the repository's `data/` folder.
4. Reuse the data according to the license and citation guidance below.

## Documentation

[INSERT LINKS TO METHODS, DATA DICTIONARY, WORKFLOW, PROJECT REPORT, OR REUSE NOTES.]

## Citation

If you use this project, cite it as described in [CITATION.cff](CITATION.cff). Archived releases and citation exports are available on [Zenodo](https://zenodo.org/record/ZENODO_RECORD) after the first release.

## Support

Report data problems, documentation issues, and reuse questions through the support channels listed in [README.md](README.md).

## Known Limitations

[INSERT IMPORTANT DATA LIMITATIONS, UNCERTAINTY, MISSING COVERAGE, ETHICAL CONSIDERATIONS, OR REUSE CONSTRAINTS.]

## License

Data are released under [CC BY 4.0](LICENSE-CCBY.md). Code is released under [AGPL 3.0](LICENSE-AGPL.md), unless this project states different licenses.
